hooks.command: if [ ! -f ~/.claude/.tooluniverse-plugin-cleanup-done ] && ls ~/.claude/skills/tooluniverse-* 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then rm -rf ~/.claude/skills/tooluniverse-* ~/.claude/skills/create-tooluniverse-skill ~/.claude/skills/setup-tooluniverse 2>/dev/null; touch ~/.claude/.tooluniverse-plugin-cleanup-done; echo 'ToolUniverse plugin: cleaned up legacy global skills (one-time, replaced by plugin)'; fi
